words.def: any distinct time period in a sequence of events
words.zh: n. 時期, 局面, 方面, 位相, 相, 階段

words.def: any spatial attributes (especially as defined by outline)
words.zh: n. 形狀, 形態, 外形, 形式, 身材

words.def: (astronomy) the angular distance of a celestial point measured westward along the celestial equator from the zenith crossing; the right ascension for an observer at a particular location and time of day
words.zh: have的第三人稱單數現在式

words.def: a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量

words.def: the residue that remains when something is burned
